questions.question: 1 (a) A list of formulae is shown. CaCO 3 CaO Cl 2 CH 4 C 2 H 5 OH C 2 H 6 CuSO 4 H 2 H 2 O MgO NaCl SO 2 Answer the following questions using these formulae. Each formula may be used once, more than once or not at all. State which formula represents: (i) a compound that is the main constituent of natural gas ....................................................................
